note: Unique Entity Title attaches a UniqueEntityTitle validation constraint to the node title and taxonomy_term name fields, enforcing per-bundle uniqueness via an opt-in third_party_settings 'enabled' flag. No central config form, no configure route, no permissions, no Drush. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented, source-grounded facts; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: What does the Unique Entity Title module do?
Where is the central settings form for Unique Entity Title?
How do I require unique titles for the Article content type without using the UI?
Which entity types does Unique Entity Title support?
When editing and re-saving an existing node with unique titles enabled, will it flag itself as a duplicate?
Does Unique Entity Title add any Drush commands or permissions?
